Call ID: EXT-025
Type: external
Date: 2026-04-30
Topic: Product Feedback
Participants: Raj (account manager); Fatima (customer)
------------------------------------------------------------
AM (Raj): Hi Fatima, thanks for making time today. How are things going on your side?
Customer (Fatima): We love the core product but the integrations feel limited.
AM (Raj): I'll flag the usability feedback; we're actively investing there.
Customer (Fatima): The team is generally positive, but there are gaps.
AM (Raj): That's really useful — I'll get this to product with your context.
Customer (Fatima): I feel better about the direction. Let's check in again soon.
AM (Raj): Thank you — I'll send a recap with clear next steps and owners by end of day.
